markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss content quality issues and improve writing guidelines for Biologica's AI-generated articles.](https://fathom.video/share/Dww6kG2C1Qits27Q9BaHZAJp6qZDHorj?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Current AI pipeline produces inconsistent quality; new pipeline in development (\~2 weeks) will have built-in validators to better adhere to guidelines](https://fathom.video/share/Dww6kG2C1Qits27Q9BaHZAJp6qZDHorj?tab=summary&timestamp=141.0)
  - [Writing guidelines need refinement: shorter, more declarative sentences; less forced relatability; focus on science-based info](https://fathom.video/share/Dww6kG2C1Qits27Q9BaHZAJp6qZDHorj?tab=summary&timestamp=317.0)
  - [Team will review/revise writing guidelines, then test new versions on sample articles to calibrate quality](https://fathom.video/share/Dww6kG2C1Qits27Q9BaHZAJp6qZDHorj?tab=summary&timestamp=1510.0)

## Topics

### Content Quality Issues

  - [Inconsistent article quality (e.g. menopause brain fog article good, alcohol article poor)](https://fathom.video/share/Dww6kG2C1Qits27Q9BaHZAJp6qZDHorj?tab=summary&timestamp=407.0)
  - [Overuse of colons, complex sentences, and forced relatability examples](https://fathom.video/share/Dww6kG2C1Qits27Q9BaHZAJp6qZDHorj?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Some unrealistic suggestions in health-related content (e.g. logging drinks in real-time)](https://fathom.video/share/Dww6kG2C1Qits27Q9BaHZAJp6qZDHorj?tab=summary&timestamp=1309.0)

### New AI Pipeline Development

  - [Current process: splits outline into sections, applies research, reassembles (can cause flow/repetition issues)](https://fathom.video/share/Dww6kG2C1Qits27Q9BaHZAJp6qZDHorj?tab=summary&timestamp=989.0)
  - [New pipeline (\~2 weeks): includes validators to check adherence to guidelines, scores performance, iterates until criteria met](https://fathom.video/share/Dww6kG2C1Qits27Q9BaHZAJp6qZDHorj?tab=summary&timestamp=1072.0)
  - [Expected to significantly reduce editing time (from \~1 hour to \~5 minutes per article)](https://fathom.video/share/Dww6kG2C1Qits27Q9BaHZAJp6qZDHorj?tab=summary&timestamp=2006.0)

### Writing Guideline Refinement

  - [Current guidelines too long (\~4000 words); aim to reduce to 1500-2000 words](https://fathom.video/share/Dww6kG2C1Qits27Q9BaHZAJp6qZDHorj?tab=summary&timestamp=1621.0)
  - [Focus on declarative, shorter sentences with less forced relatability](https://fathom.video/share/Dww6kG2C1Qits27Q9BaHZAJp6qZDHorj?tab=summary&timestamp=318.0)
  - [Separate guiding principles from specific rules (e.g. "no colons ever")](https://fathom.video/share/Dww6kG2C1Qits27Q9BaHZAJp6qZDHorj?tab=summary&timestamp=1543.0)
  - [Consider limiting relatability examples to article introductions only](https://fathom.video/share/Dww6kG2C1Qits27Q9BaHZAJp6qZDHorj?tab=summary&timestamp=1407.0)

### Potential Future Improvements

  - [Experiment with writer-specific tones (e.g. "Liz's voice")](https://fathom.video/share/Dww6kG2C1Qits27Q9BaHZAJp6qZDHorj?tab=summary&timestamp=1800.0)
  - [Possibility of fine-tuning AI model on \~25-30 pieces of existing content](https://fathom.video/share/Dww6kG2C1Qits27Q9BaHZAJp6qZDHorj?tab=summary&timestamp=1832.0)

### Medical Review Process

  - [Nancy reviewing medical content; generally positive results with minimal material changes needed](https://fathom.video/share/Dww6kG2C1Qits27Q9BaHZAJp6qZDHorj?tab=summary&timestamp=2158.0)

## Next Steps

1.  Liz to review current writing guidelines, add comments/suggestions
2.  Matthew to refine guidelines based on Liz's input, optimizing for AI comprehension
3.  Team to test revised guidelines on sample articles, iterating as needed
4.  Hold off on delivering new articles until guideline refinement process complete
5.  Brian to send over medically-approved articles for final review
